title: Title; construction
doc_html:
PART II.  LOUISIANA LIFE AND HEALTH INSURANCE

GUARANTY ASSOCIATION FUNDS

§2081.  Title; construction

This Part shall be known and may be cited as the "Louisiana Life and Health Insurance Guaranty Association Law" and shall be construed to effect the purpose under R.S. 22:2082.

Acts 1991, No. 998, §1, eff. Sept. 30, 1991; Redesignated from R.S. 22:1395.1 by Acts 2008, No. 415, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2009; Acts 2009, No. 258, §1.

NOTE:  Former R.S. 22:2081 redesignated as R.S. 22:493 by Acts 2008, No. 415, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2009.

PART II.  LOUISIANA LIFE AND HEALTH INSURANCE
GUARANTY ASSOCIATION FUNDS
§2081.  Title; construction
This Part shall be known and may be cited as the "Louisiana Life and Health Insurance Guaranty Association Law" and shall be construed to effect the purpose under R.S. 22:2082.
Acts 1991, No. 998, §1, eff. Sept. 30, 1991; Redesignated from R.S. 22:1395.1 by Acts 2008, No. 415, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2009; Acts 2009, No. 258, §1.
NOTE:  Former R.S. 22:2081 redesignated as R.S. 22:493 by Acts 2008, No. 415, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2009.
